308                                 struct bplus_node *r_ch, key_t key, int insert, int split)
309{
310        int i;
311
312        /* split key is key[split - 1] */
313        key_t split_key = key(node)[split - 1];
314
315        /* split as left sibling */
316        left_node_add(tree, node, left);
317
318        /* calculate split nodes' children (sum as (order + 1))*/
319        int pivot = insert;
320        left->children = split + 1;
321        node->children = _max_order - split;
322
323        /* sum = left->children = pivot + (split - pivot) + 1 */
324        /* replicate from key[0] to key[insert] in original node */
325        memmove(&key(left)[0], &key(node)[0], pivot * sizeof(key_t));
326        memmove(&sub(left)[0], &sub(node)[0], pivot * sizeof(off_t));
327
328        /* replicate from key[insert] to key[split] in original node */
329        memmove(&key(left)[pivot + 1], &key(node)[pivot], (split - pivot) * sizeof(key_t));
330        memmove(&sub(left)[pivot + 1], &sub(node)[pivot], (split - pivot) * sizeof(off_t));
331
332        /* flush sub-nodes of the new splitted left node */
333        for (i = 0; i < left->children; i++) {
334                if (i != pivot && i != pivot + 1) {
335                        sub_node_flush(tree, left, sub(left)[i]);
336                }
337        }
338
339        /* insert new key and sub-nodes and locate the split key */
340        key(left)[pivot] = key;
341        sub_node_update(tree, left, pivot, l_ch);
342        sub_node_update(tree, left, pivot + 1, r_ch);
343
344        /* sum = node->children = 1 + (node->children - 1) */
345        /* right node left shift from key[split] to key[children - 2] */
346        memmove(&key(node)[0], &key(node)[split], (node->children - 1) * sizeof(key_t));
347        memmove(&sub(node)[0], &sub(node)[split], (node->children) * sizeof(off_t));
348
349        return split_key;
350}
351
352static key_t non_leaf_split_middle(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node,
353                                   struct bplus_node *right, struct bplus_node *l_ch,
354                                   struct bplus_node *r_ch, key_t key, int insert, int split)
355{
356        int i;
357
358        /* split as right sibling */
359        right_node_add(tree, node, right);
360
361        /* split key is key[split - 1] */
362        key_t split_key = key(node)[split - 1];
363
364        /* calculate split nodes' children (sum as (order + 1))*/
365        int pivot = 0;
366        node->children = split;
367        right->children = _max_order - split + 1;
368
369        /* insert new key and sub-nodes */
370        key(right)[pivot] = key;
371        sub_node_update(tree, right, pivot, l_ch);
372        sub_node_update(tree, right, pivot + 1, r_ch);
373
374        /* sum = right->children = 2 + (right->children - 2) */
375        /* replicate from key[split] to key[_max_order - 2] */
376        memmove(&key(right)[pivot + 1], &key(node)[split], (right->children - 2) * sizeof(key_t));
377        memmove(&sub(right)[pivot + 2], &sub(node)[split + 1], (right->children - 2) * sizeof(off_t));
378
379        /* flush sub-nodes of the new splitted right node */
380        for (i = pivot + 2; i < right->children; i++) {
381                sub_node_flush(tree, right, sub(right)[i]);
382        }
383
384        return split_key;
385}
386
387static key_t non_leaf_split_right(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node,
388                                  struct bplus_node *right, struct bplus_node *l_ch,
389                                  struct bplus_node *r_ch, key_t key, int insert, int split)
390{
391        int i;
392
393        /* split as right sibling */
394        right_node_add(tree, node, right);
395
396        /* split key is key[split] */
397        key_t split_key = key(node)[split];
398
399        /* calculate split nodes' children (sum as (order + 1))*/
400        int pivot = insert - split - 1;
401        node->children = split + 1;
402        right->children = _max_order - split;
403
404        /* sum = right->children = pivot + 2 + (_max_order - insert - 1) */
405        /* replicate from key[split + 1] to key[insert] */
406        memmove(&key(right)[0], &key(node)[split + 1], pivot * sizeof(key_t));
407        memmove(&sub(right)[0], &sub(node)[split + 1], pivot * sizeof(off_t));
408
409        /* insert new key and sub-node */
410        key(right)[pivot] = key;
411        sub_node_update(tree, right, pivot, l_ch);
412        sub_node_update(tree, right, pivot + 1, r_ch);
413
414        /* replicate from key[insert] to key[order - 1] */
415        memmove(&key(right)[pivot + 1], &key(node)[insert], (_max_order - insert - 1) * sizeof(key_t));
416        memmove(&sub(right)[pivot + 2], &sub(node)[insert + 1], (_max_order - insert - 1) * sizeof(off_t));
417
418        /* flush sub-nodes of the new splitted right node */
419        for (i = 0; i < right->children; i++) {
420                if (i != pivot && i != pivot + 1) {
421                        sub_node_flush(tree, right, sub(right)[i]);
422                }
423        }
424
425        return split_key;
426}
427
428static void non_leaf_simple_insert(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node,
429                                   struct bplus_node *l_ch, struct bplus_node *r_ch,
430                                   key_t key, int insert)
431{
432        memmove(&key(node)[insert + 1], &key(node)[insert], (node->children - 1 - insert) * sizeof(key_t));
433        memmove(&sub(node)[insert + 2], &sub(node)[insert + 1], (node->children - 1 - insert) * sizeof(off_t));
434        /* insert new key and sub-nodes */
435        key(node)[insert] = key;
436        sub_node_update(tree, node, insert, l_ch);
437        sub_node_update(tree, node, insert + 1, r_ch);
438        node->children++;
439}
440
441static int non_leaf_insert(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node,
442                           struct bplus_node *l_ch, struct bplus_node *r_ch, key_t key)
443{
444        /* Search key location */
445        int insert = key_binary_search(node, key);
446        assert(insert < 0);
447        insert = -insert - 1;
448
449        /* node is full */
450        if (node->children == _max_order) {
451                key_t split_key;
452                /* split = [m/2] */
453                int split = node->children / 2;
454                struct bplus_node *sibling = non_leaf_new(tree);
455                if (insert < split) {
456                        split_key = non_leaf_split_left(tree, node, sibling, l_ch, r_ch, key, insert, split);
457                } else if (insert == split) {
458                        split_key = non_leaf_split_middle(tree, node, sibling, l_ch, r_ch, key, insert, split);
459                } else {
460                        split_key = non_leaf_split_right(tree, node, sibling, l_ch, r_ch, key, insert, split);
461                }
462
463                /* build new parent */
464                if (insert < split) {
465                        return parent_node_build(tree, sibling, node, split_key);
466                } else {
467                        return parent_node_build(tree, node, sibling, split_key);
468                }
469        } else {
470                non_leaf_simple_insert(tree, node, l_ch, r_ch, key, insert);
471                node_flush(tree, node);
472        }
473        return 0;
474}
475
476static key_t leaf_split_left(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf,
477                             struct bplus_node *left, key_t key, long data, int insert)
478{
479        /* split = [m/2] */
480        int split = (leaf->children + 1) / 2;
481
482        /* split as left sibling */
483        left_node_add(tree, leaf, left);
484
485        /* calculate split leaves' children (sum as (entries + 1)) */
486        int pivot = insert;
487        left->children = split;
488        leaf->children = _max_entries - split + 1;
489
490        /* sum = left->children = pivot + 1 + (split - pivot - 1) */
491        /* replicate from key[0] to key[insert] */
492        memmove(&key(left)[0], &key(leaf)[0], pivot * sizeof(key_t));
493        memmove(&data(left)[0], &data(leaf)[0], pivot * sizeof(long));
494
495        /* insert new key and data */
496        key(left)[pivot] = key;
497        data(left)[pivot] = data;
498
499        /* replicate from key[insert] to key[split - 1] */
500        memmove(&key(left)[pivot + 1], &key(leaf)[pivot], (split - pivot - 1) * sizeof(key_t));
501        memmove(&data(left)[pivot + 1], &data(leaf)[pivot], (split - pivot - 1) * sizeof(long));
502
503        /* original leaf left shift */
504        memmove(&key(leaf)[0], &key(leaf)[split - 1], leaf->children * sizeof(key_t));
505        memmove(&data(leaf)[0], &data(leaf)[split - 1], leaf->children * sizeof(long));
506
507        return key(leaf)[0];
508}
509
510static key_t leaf_split_right(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf,
511                              struct bplus_node *right, key_t key, long data, int insert)
512{
513        /* split = [m/2] */
514        int split = (leaf->children + 1) / 2;
515
516        /* split as right sibling */
517        right_node_add(tree, leaf, right);
518
519        /* calculate split leaves' children (sum as (entries + 1)) */
520        int pivot = insert - split;
521        leaf->children = split;
522        right->children = _max_entries - split + 1;
523
524        /* sum = right->children = pivot + 1 + (_max_entries - pivot - split) */
525        /* replicate from key[split] to key[children - 1] in original leaf */
526        memmove(&key(right)[0], &key(leaf)[split], pivot * sizeof(key_t));
527        memmove(&data(right)[0], &data(leaf)[split], pivot * sizeof(long));
528
529        /* insert new key and data */
530        key(right)[pivot] = key;
531        data(right)[pivot] = data;
532
533        /* replicate from key[insert] to key[children - 1] in original leaf */
534        memmove(&key(right)[pivot + 1], &key(leaf)[insert], (_max_entries - insert) * sizeof(key_t));
535        memmove(&data(right)[pivot + 1], &data(leaf)[insert], (_max_entries - insert) * sizeof(long));
536
537        return key(right)[0];
538}
539
540static void leaf_simple_insert(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf,
541                               key_t key, long data, int insert)
542{
543        memmove(&key(leaf)[insert + 1], &key(leaf)[insert], (leaf->children - insert) * sizeof(key_t));
544        memmove(&data(leaf)[insert + 1], &data(leaf)[insert], (leaf->children - insert) * sizeof(long));
545        key(leaf)[insert] = key;
546        data(leaf)[insert] = data;
547        leaf->children++;
548}
549
550static int leaf_insert(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf, key_t key, long data)
551{
552        /* Search key location */
553        int insert = key_binary_search(leaf, key);
554        if (insert >= 0) {
555                /* Already exists */
556                return -1;
557        }
558        insert = -insert - 1;
559
560        /* fetch from free node caches */
561        int i = ((char *) leaf - tree->caches) / _block_size;
562        tree->used[i] = 1;
563
564        /* leaf is full */
565        if (leaf->children == _max_entries) {
566                key_t split_key;
567                /* split = [m/2] */
568                int split = (_max_entries + 1) / 2;
569                struct bplus_node *sibling = leaf_new(tree);
570
571                /* sibling leaf replication due to location of insertion */
572                if (insert < split) {
573                        split_key = leaf_split_left(tree, leaf, sibling, key, data, insert);
574                } else {
575                        split_key = leaf_split_right(tree, leaf, sibling, key, data, insert);
576                }
577
578                /* build new parent */
579                if (insert < split) {
580                        return parent_node_build(tree, sibling, leaf, split_key);
581                } else {
582                        return parent_node_build(tree, leaf, sibling, split_key);
583                }
584        } else {
585                leaf_simple_insert(tree, leaf, key, data, insert);
586                node_flush(tree, leaf);
587        }
588
589        return 0;
590}
591
592static int bplus_tree_insert(struct bplus_tree *tree, key_t key, long data)
593{
594        struct bplus_node *node = node_seek(tree, tree->root);
595        while (node != NULL) {
596                if (is_leaf(node)) {
597                        return leaf_insert(tree, node, key, data);
598                } else {
599                        int i = key_binary_search(node, key);
600                        if (i >= 0) {
601                                node = node_seek(tree, sub(node)[i + 1]);
602                        } else {
603                                i = -i - 1;
604                                node = node_seek(tree, sub(node)[i]);
605                        }
606                }
607        }
608
609        /* new root */
610        struct bplus_node *root = leaf_new(tree);
611        key(root)[0] = key;
612        data(root)[0] = data;
613        root->children = 1;
614        tree->root = new_node_append(tree, root);
615        tree->level = 1;
616        node_flush(tree, root);
617        return 0;
618}
619
620static inline int sibling_select(struct bplus_node *l_sib, struct bplus_node *r_sib,
621                                 struct bplus_node *parent, int i)
622{
623        if (i == -1) {
624                /* the frist sub-node, no left sibling, choose the right one */
625                return RIGHT_SIBLING;
626        } else if (i == parent->children - 2) {
627                /* the last sub-node, no right sibling, choose the left one */
628                return LEFT_SIBLING;
629        } else {
630                /* if both left and right sibling found, choose the one with more children */
631                return l_sib->children >= r_sib->children ? LEFT_SIBLING : RIGHT_SIBLING;
632        }
633}
634
635static void non_leaf_shift_from_left(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node,
636                                     struct bplus_node *left, struct bplus_node *parent,
637                                     int parent_key_index, int remove)
638{
639        /* node's elements right shift */
640        memmove(&key(node)[1], &key(node)[0], remove * sizeof(key_t));
641        memmove(&sub(node)[1], &sub(node)[0], (remove + 1) * sizeof(off_t));
642
643        /* parent key right rotation */
644        key(node)[0] = key(parent)[parent_key_index];
645        key(parent)[parent_key_index] = key(left)[left->children - 2];
646
647        /* borrow the last sub-node from left sibling */
648        sub(node)[0] = sub(left)[left->children - 1];
649        sub_node_flush(tree, node, sub(node)[0]);
650
651        left->children--;
652}
653
654static void non_leaf_merge_into_left(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node,
655                                     struct bplus_node *left, struct bplus_node *parent,
656                                     int parent_key_index, int remove)
657{
658        /* move parent key down */
659        key(left)[left->children - 1] = key(parent)[parent_key_index];
660
661        /* merge into left sibling */
662        /* key sum = node->children - 2 */
663        memmove(&key(left)[left->children], &key(node)[0], remove * sizeof(key_t));
664        memmove(&sub(left)[left->children], &sub(node)[0], (remove + 1) * sizeof(off_t));
665
666        /* sub-node sum = node->children - 1 */
667        memmove(&key(left)[left->children + remove], &key(node)[remove + 1], (node->children - remove - 2) * sizeof(key_t));
668        memmove(&sub(left)[left->children + remove + 1], &sub(node)[remove + 2], (node->children - remove - 2) * sizeof(off_t));
669
670        /* flush sub-nodes of the new merged left node */
671        int i, j;
672        for (i = left->children, j = 0; j < node->children - 1; i++, j++) {
673                sub_node_flush(tree, left, sub(left)[i]);
674        }
675
676        left->children += node->children - 1;
677}
678
679static void non_leaf_shift_from_right(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node,
680                                      struct bplus_node *right, struct bplus_node *parent,
681                                      int parent_key_index)
682{
683        /* parent key left rotation */
684        key(node)[node->children - 1] = key(parent)[parent_key_index];
685        key(parent)[parent_key_index] = key(right)[0];
686
687        /* borrow the frist sub-node from right sibling */
688        sub(node)[node->children] = sub(right)[0];
689        sub_node_flush(tree, node, sub(node)[node->children]);
690        node->children++;
691
692        /* right sibling left shift*/
693        memmove(&key(right)[0], &key(right)[1], (right->children - 2) * sizeof(key_t));
694        memmove(&sub(right)[0], &sub(right)[1], (right->children - 1) * sizeof(off_t));
695
696        right->children--;
697}
698
699static void non_leaf_merge_from_right(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node,
700                                      struct bplus_node *right, struct bplus_node *parent,
701                                      int parent_key_index)
702{
703        /* move parent key down */
704        key(node)[node->children - 1] = key(parent)[parent_key_index];
705        node->children++;
706
707        /* merge from right sibling */
708        memmove(&key(node)[node->children - 1], &key(right)[0], (right->children - 1) * sizeof(key_t));
709        memmove(&sub(node)[node->children - 1], &sub(right)[0], right->children * sizeof(off_t));
710
711        /* flush sub-nodes of the new merged node */
712        int i, j;
713        for (i = node->children - 1, j = 0; j < right->children; i++, j++) {
714                sub_node_flush(tree, node, sub(node)[i]);
715        }
716
717        node->children += right->children - 1;
718}
719
720static inline void non_leaf_simple_remove(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node, int remove)
721{
722        assert(node->children >= 2);
723        memmove(&key(node)[remove], &key(node)[remove + 1], (node->children - remove - 2) * sizeof(key_t));
724        memmove(&sub(node)[remove + 1], &sub(node)[remove + 2], (node->children - remove - 2) * sizeof(off_t));
725        node->children--;
726}
727
728static void non_leaf_remove(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node, int remove)
729{
730        if (node->parent == INVALID_OFFSET) {
731                /* node is the root */
732                if (node->children == 2) {
733                        /* replace old root with the first sub-node */
734                        struct bplus_node *root = node_fetch(tree, sub(node)[0]);
735                        root->parent = INVALID_OFFSET;
736                        tree->root = root->self;
737                        tree->level--;
738                        node_delete(tree, node, NULL, NULL);
739                        node_flush(tree, root);
740                } else {
741                        non_leaf_simple_remove(tree, node, remove);
742                        node_flush(tree, node);
743                }
744        } else if (node->children <= (_max_order + 1) / 2) {
745                struct bplus_node *l_sib = node_fetch(tree, node->prev);
746                struct bplus_node *r_sib = node_fetch(tree, node->next);
747                struct bplus_node *parent = node_fetch(tree, node->parent);
748
749                int i = parent_key_index(parent, key(node)[0]);
750
751                /* decide which sibling to be borrowed from */
752                if (sibling_select(l_sib, r_sib, parent, i)  == LEFT_SIBLING) {
753                        if (l_sib->children > (_max_order + 1) / 2) {
754                                non_leaf_shift_from_left(tree, node, l_sib, parent, i, remove);
755                                /* flush nodes */
756                                node_flush(tree, node);
757                                node_flush(tree, l_sib);
758                                node_flush(tree, r_sib);
759                                node_flush(tree, parent);
760                        } else {
761                                non_leaf_merge_into_left(tree, node, l_sib, parent, i, remove);
762                                /* delete empty node and flush */
763                                node_delete(tree, node, l_sib, r_sib);
764                                /* trace upwards */
765                                non_leaf_remove(tree, parent, i);
766                        }
767                } else {
768                        /* remove at first in case of overflow during merging with sibling */
769                        non_leaf_simple_remove(tree, node, remove);
770
771                        if (r_sib->children > (_max_order + 1) / 2) {
772                                non_leaf_shift_from_right(tree, node, r_sib, parent, i + 1);
773                                /* flush nodes */
774                                node_flush(tree, node);
775                                node_flush(tree, l_sib);
776                                node_flush(tree, r_sib);
777                                node_flush(tree, parent);
778                        } else {
779                                non_leaf_merge_from_right(tree, node, r_sib, parent, i + 1);
780                                /* delete empty right sibling and flush */
781                                struct bplus_node *rr_sib = node_fetch(tree, r_sib->next);
782                                node_delete(tree, r_sib, node, rr_sib);
783                                node_flush(tree, l_sib);
784                                /* trace upwards */
785                                non_leaf_remove(tree, parent, i + 1);
786                        }
787                }
788        } else {
789                non_leaf_simple_remove(tree, node, remove);
790                node_flush(tree, node);
791        }
792}
793
794static void leaf_shift_from_left(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf,
795                                 struct bplus_node *left, struct bplus_node *parent,
796                                 int parent_key_index, int remove)
797{
798        /* right shift in leaf node */
799        memmove(&key(leaf)[1], &key(leaf)[0], remove * sizeof(key_t));
800        memmove(&data(leaf)[1], &data(leaf)[0], remove * sizeof(off_t));
801
802        /* borrow the last element from left sibling */
803        key(leaf)[0] = key(left)[left->children - 1];
804        data(leaf)[0] = data(left)[left->children - 1];
805        left->children--;
806
807        /* update parent key */
808        key(parent)[parent_key_index] = key(leaf)[0];
809}
810
811static void leaf_merge_into_left(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf,
812                                 struct bplus_node *left, int parent_key_index, int remove)
813{
814        /* merge into left sibling, sum = leaf->children - 1*/
815        memmove(&key(left)[left->children], &key(leaf)[0], remove * sizeof(key_t));
816        memmove(&data(left)[left->children], &data(leaf)[0], remove * sizeof(off_t));
817        memmove(&key(left)[left->children + remove], &key(leaf)[remove + 1], (leaf->children - remove - 1) * sizeof(key_t));
818        memmove(&data(left)[left->children + remove], &data(leaf)[remove + 1], (leaf->children - remove - 1) * sizeof(off_t));
819        left->children += leaf->children - 1;
820}
821
822static void leaf_shift_from_right(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf,
823                                  struct bplus_node *right, struct bplus_node *parent,
824                                  int parent_key_index)
825{
826        /* borrow the first element from right sibling */
827        key(leaf)[leaf->children] = key(right)[0];
828        data(leaf)[leaf->children] = data(right)[0];
829        leaf->children++;
830
831        /* left shift in right sibling */
832        memmove(&key(right)[0], &key(right)[1], (right->children - 1) * sizeof(key_t));
833        memmove(&data(right)[0], &data(right)[1], (right->children - 1) * sizeof(off_t));
834        right->children--;
835
836        /* update parent key */
837        key(parent)[parent_key_index] = key(right)[0];
838}
839
840static inline void leaf_merge_from_right(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf,
841                                         struct bplus_node *right)
842{
843        memmove(&key(leaf)[leaf->children], &key(right)[0], right->children * sizeof(key_t));
844        memmove(&data(leaf)[leaf->children], &data(right)[0], right->children * sizeof(off_t));
845        leaf->children += right->children;
846}
847
848static inline void leaf_simple_remove(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf, int remove)
849{
850        memmove(&key(leaf)[remove], &key(leaf)[remove + 1], (leaf->children - remove - 1) * sizeof(key_t));
851        memmove(&data(leaf)[remove], &data(leaf)[remove + 1], (leaf->children - remove - 1) * sizeof(off_t));
852        leaf->children--;
853}
854
855static int leaf_remove(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *leaf, key_t key)
856{
857        int remove = key_binary_search(leaf, key);
858        if (remove < 0) {
859                /* Not exist */
860                return -1;
861        }
862
863        /* fetch from free node caches */
864        int i = ((char *) leaf - tree->caches) / _block_size;
865        tree->used[i] = 1;
866
867        if (leaf->parent == INVALID_OFFSET) {
868                /* leaf as the root */
869                if (leaf->children == 1) {
870                        /* delete the only last node */
871                        assert(key == key(leaf)[0]);
872                        tree->root = INVALID_OFFSET;
873                        tree->level = 0;
874                        node_delete(tree, leaf, NULL, NULL);
875                } else {
876                        leaf_simple_remove(tree, leaf, remove);
877                        node_flush(tree, leaf);
878                }
879        } else if (leaf->children <= (_max_entries + 1) / 2) {
880                struct bplus_node *l_sib = node_fetch(tree, leaf->prev);
881                struct bplus_node *r_sib = node_fetch(tree, leaf->next);
882                struct bplus_node *parent = node_fetch(tree, leaf->parent);
883
884                i = parent_key_index(parent, key(leaf)[0]);
885
886                /* decide which sibling to be borrowed from */
887                if (sibling_select(l_sib, r_sib, parent, i) == LEFT_SIBLING) {
888                        if (l_sib->children > (_max_entries + 1) / 2) {
889                                leaf_shift_from_left(tree, leaf, l_sib, parent, i, remove);
890                                /* flush leaves */
891                                node_flush(tree, leaf);
892                                node_flush(tree, l_sib);
893                                node_flush(tree, r_sib);
894                                node_flush(tree, parent);
895                        } else {
896                                leaf_merge_into_left(tree, leaf, l_sib, i, remove);
897                                /* delete empty leaf and flush */
898                                node_delete(tree, leaf, l_sib, r_sib);
899                                /* trace upwards */
900                                non_leaf_remove(tree, parent, i);
901                        }
902                } else {
903                        /* remove at first in case of overflow during merging with sibling */
904                        leaf_simple_remove(tree, leaf, remove);
905
906                        if (r_sib->children > (_max_entries + 1) / 2) {
907                                leaf_shift_from_right(tree, leaf, r_sib, parent, i + 1);
908                                /* flush leaves */
909                                node_flush(tree, leaf);
910                                node_flush(tree, l_sib);
911                                node_flush(tree, r_sib);
912                                node_flush(tree, parent);
913                        } else {
914                                leaf_merge_from_right(tree, leaf, r_sib);
915                                /* delete empty right sibling flush */
916                                struct bplus_node *rr_sib = node_fetch(tree, r_sib->next);
917                                node_delete(tree, r_sib, leaf, rr_sib);
918                                node_flush(tree, l_sib);
919                                /* trace upwards */
920                                non_leaf_remove(tree, parent, i + 1);
921                        }
922                }
923        } else {
924                leaf_simple_remove(tree, leaf, remove);
925                node_flush(tree, leaf);
926        }
927
928        return 0;
929}
930
931static int bplus_tree_delete(struct bplus_tree *tree, key_t key)
932{
933        struct bplus_node *node = node_seek(tree, tree->root);
934        while (node != NULL) {
935                if (is_leaf(node)) {
936                        return leaf_remove(tree, node, key);
937                } else {
938                        int i = key_binary_search(node, key);
939                        if (i >= 0) {
940                                node = node_seek(tree, sub(node)[i + 1]);
941                        } else {
942                                i = -i - 1;
943                                node = node_seek(tree, sub(node)[i]);
944                        }
945                }
946        }
947        return -1;
948}
949
950long bplus_tree_get(struct bplus_tree *tree, key_t key)
951{
952        return bplus_tree_search(tree, key);
953}
954
955int bplus_tree_put(struct bplus_tree *tree, key_t key, long data)
956{
957        if (data) {
958                return bplus_tree_insert(tree, key, data);
959        } else {
960                return bplus_tree_delete(tree, key);
961        }
962}
963
964long bplus_tree_get_range(struct bplus_tree *tree, key_t key1, key_t key2)
965{
966        long start = -1;
967        key_t min = key1 <= key2 ? key1 : key2;
968        key_t max = min == key1 ? key2 : key1;
969
970        struct bplus_node *node = node_seek(tree, tree->root);
971        while (node != NULL) {
972                int i = key_binary_search(node, min);
973                if (is_leaf(node)) {
974                        if (i < 0) {
975                                i = -i - 1;
976                                if (i >= node->children) {
977                                        node = node_seek(tree, node->next);
978                                }
979                        }
980                        while (node != NULL && key(node)[i] <= max) {
981                                start = data(node)[i];
982                                if (++i >= node->children) {
983                                        node = node_seek(tree, node->next);
984                                        i = 0;
985                                }
986                        }
987                        break;
988                } else {
989                        if (i >= 0) {
990                                node = node_seek(tree, sub(node)[i + 1]);
991                        } else  {
992                                i = -i - 1;
993                                node = node_seek(tree, sub(node)[i]);
994                        }
995                }
996        }
997
998        return start;
999}
1000
1001int bplus_open(char *filename)
1002{
1003        return open(filename, O_CREAT | O_RDWR, 0644);
1004}
1005
1006void bplus_close(int fd)
1007{
1008        fsync(fd);
1009        close(fd);
1010}
1011
1012static off_t str_to_hex(char *c, int len)
1013{
1014        off_t offset = 0;
1015        while (len-- > 0) {
1016                if (isdigit(*c)) {
1017                        offset = offset * 16 + *c - '0';
1018                } else if (isxdigit(*c)) {
1019                        if (islower(*c)) {
1020                                offset = offset * 16 + *c - 'a' + 10;
1021                        } else {
1022                                offset = offset * 16 + *c - 'A' + 10;
1023                        }
1024                }
1025                c++;
1026        }
1027        return offset;
1028}
1029
1030static inline void hex_to_str(off_t offset, char *buf, int len)
1031{
1032        const static char *hex = "0123456789ABCDEF";
1033        while (len-- > 0) {
1034                buf[len] = hex[offset & 0xf];
1035                offset >>= 4;
1036        }
1037}
1038
1039static inline off_t offset_load(int fd)
1040{
1041        char buf[ADDR_STR_WIDTH];
1042        ssize_t len = read(fd, buf, sizeof(buf));
1043        return len > 0 ? str_to_hex(buf, sizeof(buf)) : INVALID_OFFSET;
1044}
1045
1046static inline ssize_t offset_store(int fd, off_t offset)
1047{
1048        char buf[ADDR_STR_WIDTH];
1049        hex_to_str(offset, buf, sizeof(buf));
1050        return write(fd, buf, sizeof(buf));
1051}
1052
1053struct bplus_tree *bplus_tree_init(char *filename, int block_size)
1054{
1055        int i;
1056        struct bplus_node node;
1057
1058        if (strlen(filename) >= 1024) {
1059                fprintf(stderr, "Index file name too long!\n");
1060                return NULL;
1061        }
1062
1063        if ((block_size & (block_size - 1)) != 0) {
1064                fprintf(stderr, "Block size must be pow of 2!\n");
1065                return NULL;
1066        }
1067
1068        if (block_size < (int) sizeof(node)) {
1069                fprintf(stderr, "block size is too small for one node!\n");
1070                return NULL;
1071        }
1072
1073        _block_size = block_size;
1074        _max_order = (block_size - sizeof(node)) / (sizeof(key_t) + sizeof(off_t));
1075        _max_entries = (block_size - sizeof(node)) / (sizeof(key_t) + sizeof(long));
1076        if (_max_order <= 2) {
1077                fprintf(stderr, "block size is too small for one node!\n");
1078                return NULL;
1079        }
1080
1081        struct bplus_tree *tree = calloc(1, sizeof(*tree));
1082        assert(tree != NULL);
1083        list_init(&tree->free_blocks);
1084        strcpy(tree->filename, filename);
1085
1086        /* load index boot file */
1087        int fd = open(strcat(tree->filename, ".boot"), O_RDWR, 0644);
1088        if (fd >= 0) {
1089                tree->root = offset_load(fd);
1090                _block_size = offset_load(fd);
1091                tree->file_size = offset_load(fd);
1092                /* load free blocks */
1093                while ((i = offset_load(fd)) != INVALID_OFFSET) {
1094                        struct free_block *block = malloc(sizeof(*block));
1095                        assert(block != NULL);
1096                        block->offset = i;
1097                        list_add(&block->link, &tree->free_blocks);
1098                }
1099                fsync(fd);
1100                close(fd);
1101        } else {
1102                tree->root = INVALID_OFFSET;
1103                _block_size = block_size;
1104                tree->file_size = 0;
1105        }
1106
1107        /* set order and entries */
1108        _max_order = (_block_size - sizeof(node)) / (sizeof(key_t) + sizeof(off_t));
1109        _max_entries = (_block_size - sizeof(node)) / (sizeof(key_t) + sizeof(long));
1110#ifdef _BPLUS_TREE_DEBUG
1111        printf("config node order:%d and leaf entries:%d\n", _max_order, _max_entries);
1112#endif
1113
1114        /* init free node caches */
1115        tree->caches = malloc(_block_size * MIN_CACHE_NUM);
1116
1117        /* open data file */
1118        tree->fd = bplus_open(filename);
1119        assert(tree->fd >= 0);
1120        return tree;
1121}
1122
1123void bplus_tree_deinit(struct bplus_tree *tree)
1124{
1125        int fd = open(tree->filename, O_CREAT | O_RDWR, 0644);
1126        assert(fd >= 0);
1127        assert(offset_store(fd, tree->root) == ADDR_STR_WIDTH);
1128        assert(offset_store(fd, _block_size) == ADDR_STR_WIDTH);
1129        assert(offset_store(fd, tree->file_size) == ADDR_STR_WIDTH);
1130
1131        /* store free blocks in files for future reuse */
1132        struct list_head *pos, *n;
1133        list_for_each_safe(pos, n, &tree->free_blocks) {
1134                list_del(pos);
1135                struct free_block *block = list_entry(pos, struct free_block, link);
1136                assert(offset_store(fd, block->offset) == ADDR_STR_WIDTH);
1137                free(block);
1138        }
1139
1140        fsync(fd);
1141        close(fd);
1142        bplus_close(tree->fd);
1143        free(tree->caches);
1144        free(tree);
1145}
1146
1147#ifdef _BPLUS_TREE_DEBUG
1148
1149#define MAX_LEVEL 10
1150
1151struct node_backlog {
1152        /* Node backlogged */
1153        off_t offset;
1154        /* The index next to the backtrack point, must be >= 1 */
1155        int next_sub_idx;
1156};
1157
1158static inline int children(struct bplus_node *node)
1159{
1160        assert(!is_leaf(node));
1161        return node->children;
1162}
1163
1164static void node_key_dump(struct bplus_node *node)
1165{
1166        int i;
1167        if (is_leaf(node)) {
1168                printf("leaf:");
1169                for (i = 0; i < node->children; i++) {
1170                        printf(" %d", key(node)[i]);
1171                }
1172        } else {
1173                printf("node:");
1174                for (i = 0; i < node->children - 1; i++) {
1175                        printf(" %d", key(node)[i]);
1176                }
1177        }
1178        printf("\n");
1179}
1180
1181static void draw(struct bplus_tree *tree, struct bplus_node *node, struct node_backlog *stack, int level)
1182{
1183        int i;
1184        for (i = 1; i < level; i++) {
1185                if (i == level - 1) {
1186                        printf("%-8s", "+-------");
1187                } else {
1188                        if (stack[i - 1].offset != INVALID_OFFSET) {
1189                                printf("%-8s", "|");
1190                        } else {
1191                                printf("%-8s", " ");
1192                        }
1193                }
1194        }
1195        node_key_dump(node);
1196}
1197
1198void bplus_tree_dump(struct bplus_tree *tree)
1199{
1200        int level = 0;
1201        struct bplus_node *node = node_seek(tree, tree->root);
1202        struct node_backlog *p_nbl = NULL;
1203        struct node_backlog nbl_stack[MAX_LEVEL];
1204        struct node_backlog *top = nbl_stack;
1205
1206        for (; ;) {
1207                if (node != NULL) {
1208                        /* non-zero needs backward and zero does not */
1209                        int sub_idx = p_nbl != NULL ? p_nbl->next_sub_idx : 0;
1210                        /* Reset each loop */
1211                        p_nbl = NULL;
1212
1213                        /* Backlog the node */
1214                        if (is_leaf(node) || sub_idx + 1 >= children(node)) {
1215                                top->offset = INVALID_OFFSET;
1216                                top->next_sub_idx = 0;
1217                        } else {
1218                                top->offset = node->self;
1219                                top->next_sub_idx = sub_idx + 1;
1220                        }
1221                        top++;
1222                        level++;
1223
1224                        /* Draw the node when first passed through */
1225                        if (sub_idx == 0) {
1226                                draw(tree, node, nbl_stack, level);
1227                        }
1228
1229                        /* Move deep down */
1230                        node = is_leaf(node) ? NULL : node_seek(tree, sub(node)[sub_idx]);
1231                } else {
1232                        p_nbl = top == nbl_stack ? NULL : --top;
1233                        if (p_nbl == NULL) {
1234                                /* End of traversal */
1235                                break;
1236                        }
1237                        node = node_seek(tree, p_nbl->offset);
1238                        level--;
1239                }
1240        }
1241}
1242
1243#endif
지금 코드 memory_bptree.c
1#include <stdlib.h>
2#include <string.h>
3
4#include "memory_bptree.h"
5
6#define BPTREE_MAX_KEYS 15
7#define BPTREE_MAX_CHILDREN (BPTREE_MAX_KEYS + 1)
8
9typedef struct BPlusNode {
10    int is_leaf;
11    int key_count;
12    int keys[BPTREE_MAX_KEYS];
13    struct BPlusNode *children[BPTREE_MAX_CHILDREN];
14    long values[BPTREE_MAX_KEYS];
15    struct BPlusNode *next;
16} BPlusNode;
17
18struct MemoryBPlusTree {
19    BPlusNode *root;
20};
21
22typedef struct {
23    int status;
24    int split;
25    int promoted_key;
26    BPlusNode *right_node;
27} InsertResult;
28
29static BPlusNode *create_node(int is_leaf);
30static void destroy_node(BPlusNode *node);
31static const BPlusNode *find_leaf(const BPlusNode *node, int key);
32static int find_insert_index(const int *keys, int key_count, int key);
33static int find_child_index(const BPlusNode *node, int key);
34static InsertResult insert_recursive(BPlusNode *node, int key, long value);
35static InsertResult insert_into_leaf(BPlusNode *leaf, int key, long value);
36static InsertResult insert_into_internal(BPlusNode *node, int child_index, InsertResult child_result);
37
38MemoryBPlusTree *memory_bptree_create(void) {
39    MemoryBPlusTree *tree = calloc(1, sizeof(*tree));
40
41    if (tree == NULL) {
42        return NULL;
43    }
44
45    tree->root = create_node(1);
46    if (tree->root == NULL) {
47        free(tree);
48        return NULL;
49    }
50
51    return tree;
52}
53
54void memory_bptree_destroy(MemoryBPlusTree *tree) {
55    if (tree == NULL) {
56        return;
57    }
58
59    destroy_node(tree->root);
60    free(tree);
61}
62
63int memory_bptree_get(const MemoryBPlusTree *tree, int key, long *value) {
64    const BPlusNode *leaf;
65    int index;
66
67    if (tree == NULL || tree->root == NULL) {
68        return 0;
69    }
70
71    leaf = find_leaf(tree->root, key);
72    if (leaf == NULL) {
73        return 0;
74    }
75
76    index = find_insert_index(leaf->keys, leaf->key_count, key);
77    if (index >= leaf->key_count || leaf->keys[index] != key) {
78        return 0;
79    }
80
81    if (value != NULL) {
82        *value = leaf->values[index];
83    }
84    return 1;
85}
86
87int memory_bptree_put(MemoryBPlusTree *tree, int key, long value) {
88    InsertResult result;
89    BPlusNode *new_root;
90
91    if (tree == NULL || tree->root == NULL) {
92        return -1;
93    }
94
95    result = insert_recursive(tree->root, key, value);
//리뷰 포인트: 삽입은 재귀적으로 내려가며 split 결과를 부모에게 올리는 방식으로 구현했다.
96    if (result.status <= 0) {
97        return result.status;
98    }
99
100    if (!result.split) {
101        return 1;
102    }
103
104    new_root = create_node(0);
105    if (new_root == NULL) {
106        return -1;
107    }
108
109    new_root->keys[0] = result.promoted_key;
110    new_root->children[0] = tree->root;
111    new_root->children[1] = result.right_node;
112    new_root->key_count = 1;
113    tree->root = new_root;
114    return 1;
115}
116
117static BPlusNode *create_node(int is_leaf) {
118    BPlusNode *node = calloc(1, sizeof(*node));
119
120    if (node == NULL) {
121        return NULL;
122    }
123
124    node->is_leaf = is_leaf;
125    return node;
126}
127
128static void destroy_node(BPlusNode *node) {
129    if (node == NULL) {
130        return;
131    }
132
133    if (!node->is_leaf) {
134        for (int i = 0; i <= node->key_count; i++) {
135            destroy_node(node->children[i]);
136        }
137    }
138
139    free(node);
140}
141
142static const BPlusNode *find_leaf(const BPlusNode *node, int key) {
143    const BPlusNode *current = node;
144
145    while (current != NULL && !current->is_leaf) {
146        current = current->children[find_child_index(current, key)];
147    }
148
149    return current;
150}
151
152static int find_insert_index(const int *keys, int key_count, int key) {
153    int index = 0;
154
155    while (index < key_count && keys[index] < key) {
156        index++;
157    }
158
159    return index;
160}
161
162static int find_child_index(const BPlusNode *node, int key) {
163    int index = 0;
164
165    while (index < node->key_count && key >= node->keys[index]) {
166        index++;
167    }
168
169    return index;
170}
171
172static InsertResult insert_recursive(BPlusNode *node, int key, long value) {
173    InsertResult child_result;
174    int child_index;
175
176    if (node->is_leaf) {
177        return insert_into_leaf(node, key, value);
178    }
179
180    child_index = find_child_index(node, key);
181    child_result = insert_recursive(node->children[child_index], key, value);
182    if (child_result.status <= 0 || !child_result.split) {
183        return child_result;
184    }
185
186    return insert_into_internal(node, child_index, child_result);
187}
188
189static InsertResult insert_into_leaf(BPlusNode *leaf, int key, long value) {
190    InsertResult result = {1, 0, 0, NULL};
191    int insert_index = find_insert_index(leaf->keys, leaf->key_count, key);
192
193    if (insert_index < leaf->key_count && leaf->keys[insert_index] == key) {
194        result.status = 0;
195        return result;
196    }
197
198    if (leaf->key_count < BPTREE_MAX_KEYS) {
199        memmove(&leaf->keys[insert_index + 1], &leaf->keys[insert_index],
200                sizeof(leaf->keys[0]) * (leaf->key_count - insert_index));
201        memmove(&leaf->values[insert_index + 1], &leaf->values[insert_index],
202                sizeof(leaf->values[0]) * (leaf->key_count - insert_index));
203        leaf->keys[insert_index] = key;
204        leaf->values[insert_index] = value;
205        leaf->key_count++;
206        return result;
207    }
208
209    {
210        int temp_keys[BPTREE_MAX_KEYS + 1];
211        long temp_values[BPTREE_MAX_KEYS + 1];
212        int total_keys = BPTREE_MAX_KEYS + 1;
213        int left_count = total_keys / 2;
//리뷰 포인트: 리프 split 시 왼쪽과 오른쪽 키 개수를 계산해 반으로 나눈다.
214        int right_count = total_keys - left_count;
215        BPlusNode *right = create_node(1);
216
217        if (right == NULL) {
218            result.status = -1;
219            return result;
220        }
221
222        memcpy(temp_keys, leaf->keys, sizeof(leaf->keys));
223        memcpy(temp_values, leaf->values, sizeof(leaf->values));
224
225        memmove(&temp_keys[insert_index + 1], &temp_keys[insert_index],
226                sizeof(temp_keys[0]) * (BPTREE_MAX_KEYS - insert_index));
227        memmove(&temp_values[insert_index + 1], &temp_values[insert_index],
228                sizeof(temp_values[0]) * (BPTREE_MAX_KEYS - insert_index));
229        temp_keys[insert_index] = key;
230        temp_values[insert_index] = value;
231
232        memset(leaf->keys, 0, sizeof(leaf->keys));
233        memset(leaf->values, 0, sizeof(leaf->values));
234        memcpy(leaf->keys, temp_keys, sizeof(temp_keys[0]) * left_count);
235        memcpy(leaf->values, temp_values, sizeof(temp_values[0]) * left_count);
236        leaf->key_count = left_count;
237
238        memcpy(right->keys, temp_keys + left_count, sizeof(temp_keys[0]) * right_count);
239        memcpy(right->values, temp_values + left_count, sizeof(temp_values[0]) * right_count);
240        right->key_count = right_count;
241        right->next = leaf->next;
242        leaf->next = right;
243
244        result.split = 1;
245        result.promoted_key = right->keys[0];
//리뷰 포인트: 리프 split 후 부모에 올리는 separator key는 오른쪽 새 리프의 첫 key다.
246        result.right_node = right;
247        return result;
248    }
249}
250
251static InsertResult insert_into_internal(BPlusNode *node, int child_index, InsertResult child_result) {
252    InsertResult result = {1, 0, 0, NULL};
253
254    if (node->key_count < BPTREE_MAX_KEYS) {
255        memmove(&node->keys[child_index + 1], &node->keys[child_index],
256                sizeof(node->keys[0]) * (node->key_count - child_index));
257        memmove(&node->children[child_index + 2], &node->children[child_index + 1],
258                sizeof(node->children[0]) * (node->key_count - child_index));
259        node->keys[child_index] = child_result.promoted_key;
260        node->children[child_index + 1] = child_result.right_node;
261        node->key_count++;
262        return result;
263    }
264
265    {
266        int temp_keys[BPTREE_MAX_KEYS + 1];
267        BPlusNode *temp_children[BPTREE_MAX_CHILDREN + 1];
268        int total_keys = BPTREE_MAX_KEYS + 1;
269        int promote_index = total_keys / 2;
//리뷰 포인트: 내부 노드는 가운데 key를 올리고 좌우 자식 배열을 다시 배치한다.
270        int left_keys = promote_index;
271        int right_keys = total_keys - promote_index - 1;
272        BPlusNode *right = create_node(0);
273
274        if (right == NULL) {
275            result.status = -1;
276            return result;
277        }
278
279        memcpy(temp_keys, node->keys, sizeof(node->keys));
280        memcpy(temp_children, node->children, sizeof(node->children));
281
282        memmove(&temp_keys[child_index + 1], &temp_keys[child_index],
283                sizeof(temp_keys[0]) * (BPTREE_MAX_KEYS - child_index));
284        temp_keys[child_index] = child_result.promoted_key;
285
286        memmove(&temp_children[child_index + 2], &temp_children[child_index + 1],
287                sizeof(temp_children[0]) * (BPTREE_MAX_CHILDREN - child_index - 1));
288        temp_children[child_index + 1] = child_result.right_node;
289
290        memset(node->keys, 0, sizeof(node->keys));
291        memset(node->children, 0, sizeof(node->children));
292        memcpy(node->keys, temp_keys, sizeof(temp_keys[0]) * left_keys);
293        memcpy(node->children, temp_children, sizeof(temp_children[0]) * (left_keys + 1));
294        node->key_count = left_keys;
295
296        memcpy(right->keys, temp_keys + promote_index + 1, sizeof(temp_keys[0]) * right_keys);
297        memcpy(right->children, temp_children + promote_index + 1,
298               sizeof(temp_children[0]) * (right_keys + 1));
299        right->key_count = right_keys;
300
301        result.split = 1;
302        result.promoted_key = temp_keys[promote_index];
303        result.right_node = right;
304        return result;
305    }
306}
CMakeLists.txt

CMakeLists.txt

전체 파일 비교 보기

처음 코드 CMakeLists.txt
1cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2)
2project(jungle_mini_db C)
3
4set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
5
6add_executable(
//리뷰 포인트: 초기 빌드는 실행 파일 하나만 만들고 테스트 타깃이 없다.
7        jungle_mini_db
8        main.c
9        parser.c
10        executor.c
11        db_index.c
12        thirdparty/bplustree.c
13)
14target_compile_definitions(jungle_mini_db PRIVATE PROJECT_ROOT_DIR="${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}")
지금 코드 CMakeLists.txt
1cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)
2project(jungle_mini_db C)
3
4set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
5enable_testing()
//리뷰 포인트: 현재 빌드 설정은 CTest를 켜고 테스트 러너를 포함한다.
6
7add_executable(
8        jungle_mini_db
9        main.c
10        parser.c
11        executor.c
12        db_index.c
13        memory_bptree.c
14)
15target_compile_definitions(jungle_mini_db PRIVATE PROJECT_ROOT_DIR="${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}")
16
17add_executable(
18        memory_bptree_tests
19        tests/test_memory_bptree.c
20        memory_bptree.c
21)
22target_include_directories(memory_bptree_tests PRIVATE ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR})
23add_test(NAME memory_bptree_tests COMMAND memory_bptree_tests)
//리뷰 포인트: 트리 자체를 빠르게 검증할 수 있는 단위 테스트가 추가됐다.
24
25find_package(Python3 COMPONENTS Interpreter REQUIRED)
26add_test(
27        NAME mini_db_requirements
//리뷰 포인트: 요구사항 관점의 기능 테스트도 자동화됐다.
28        COMMAND ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/test_mini_db_requirements.py ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}
29)
tests/test_memory_bptree.c

tests/test_memory_bptree.c

전체 파일 비교 보기

처음 코드 처음 코드에는 이 파일이 없습니다.
1처음 코드에는 이 파일이 없습니다.
지금 코드 tests/test_memory_bptree.c
1#include <assert.h>
2#include <stdio.h>
3
4#include "memory_bptree.h"
5
6static void test_sequential_inserts_and_reads(void) {
7    MemoryBPlusTree *tree = memory_bptree_create();
8
9    assert(tree != NULL);
10    for (int key = 1; key <= 256; key++) {
11        assert(memory_bptree_put(tree, key, key * 64L) == 1);
12    }
13
14    for (int key = 1; key <= 256; key++) {
15        long value = -1;
16
17        assert(memory_bptree_get(tree, key, &value) == 1);
18        assert(value == key * 64L);
19    }
20
21    memory_bptree_destroy(tree);
22}
23
24static void test_duplicate_and_missing_keys(void) {
25    MemoryBPlusTree *tree = memory_bptree_create();
26    long value = -1;
27
28    assert(tree != NULL);
29    assert(memory_bptree_put(tree, 42, 128L) == 1);
30    assert(memory_bptree_put(tree, 42, 256L) == 0);
//리뷰 포인트: 같은 key를 두 번 넣을 때 중복 삽입을 거부하는지 확인한다.
31    assert(memory_bptree_get(tree, 99, &value) == 0);
32    assert(memory_bptree_get(tree, 42, &value) == 1);
33    assert(value == 128L);
34
35    memory_bptree_destroy(tree);
36}
37
38static void test_out_of_order_inserts(void) {
//리뷰 포인트: 키가 정렬되어 들어오지 않아도 탐색 결과가 맞는지 확인하는 케이스다.
39    int keys[] = {50, 10, 70, 20, 60, 80, 30, 40, 90, 100, 15, 25, 35, 45};
40    MemoryBPlusTree *tree = memory_bptree_create();
41
42    assert(tree != NULL);
43    for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(keys) / sizeof(keys[0]); i++) {
44        assert(memory_bptree_put(tree, keys[i], keys[i] * 8L) == 1);
45    }
46
47    for (size_t i = 0; i < sizeof(keys) / sizeof(keys[0]); i++) {
48        long value = -1;
49
50        assert(memory_bptree_get(tree, keys[i], &value) == 1);
51        assert(value == keys[i] * 8L);
52    }
53
54    memory_bptree_destroy(tree);
55}
56
57int main(void) {
58    test_sequential_inserts_and_reads();
59    test_duplicate_and_missing_keys();
60    test_out_of_order_inserts();
61    puts("memory_bptree tests passed");
62    return 0;
63}
tests/test_mini_db_requirements.py

tests/test_mini_db_requirements.py

전체 파일 비교 보기

처음 코드 처음 코드에는 이 파일이 없습니다.
1처음 코드에는 이 파일이 없습니다.
지금 코드 tests/test_mini_db_requirements.py
1#!/usr/bin/env python3
2"""Functional checks for auto-id INSERT and B+Tree-backed id lookup."""
3
4from __future__ import annotations
5
6import subprocess
7import tempfile
8from pathlib import Path
9
10
11def build_binary(repo_root: Path, project_root: Path, output_path: Path) -> None:
12    sources = [
13        "main.c",
14        "parser.c",
15        "executor.c",
16        "db_index.c",
17        "memory_bptree.c",
18    ]
19    command = [
20        "cc",
21        "-std=c11",
22        f'-DPROJECT_ROOT_DIR="{project_root}"',
23        *sources,
24        "-o",
25        str(output_path),
26    ]
27    completed = subprocess.run(
28        command,
29        cwd=repo_root,
30        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
31        stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
32        text=True,
33        check=False,
34    )
35    if completed.returncode != 0:
36        raise AssertionError(
37            "failed to build test binary\nstdout:\n%s\nstderr:\n%s"
38            % (completed.stdout, completed.stderr)
39        )
40
41
42def run_db(binary_path: Path, commands: str) -> str:
43    completed = subprocess.run(
44        [str(binary_path)],
45        input=commands,
46        stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
47        stderr=subprocess.PIPE,
48        text=True,
49        check=False,
50    )
51    if completed.returncode != 0:
52        raise AssertionError(
53            "mini DB returned %d\nstdout:\n%s\nstderr:\n%s"
54            % (completed.returncode, completed.stdout, completed.stderr)
55        )
56    return completed.stdout
57
58
59def assert_contains(text: str, expected: str) -> None:
60    if expected not in text:
61        raise AssertionError("expected %r in output:\n%s" % (expected, text))
62
63
64def main() -> int:
65    repo_root = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
66
67    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="mini-db-test-") as temp_dir_name:
68        project_root = Path(temp_dir_name)
69        data_dir = project_root / "data"
70        binary_path = project_root / "jungle_mini_db_test"
71
72        data_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
73        (data_dir / "users.csv").write_text("", encoding="ascii")
74        (data_dir / "posts.csv").write_text("", encoding="ascii")
75
76        build_binary(repo_root, project_root, binary_path)
77
78        output = run_db(
79            binary_path,
80            "\n".join(
81                [
82                    "insert into users values (alice);",
//리뷰 포인트: 자동 ID INSERT 지원 여부를 직접 검증하는 입력이다.
83                    "insert into users values (5,bob);",
84                    "insert into users values (carol);",
85                    "select * from users where id = 1;",
86                    "select * from users where id = 5;",
87                    "select * from users where id = 6;",
88                    "select * from users where name = carol;",
//리뷰 포인트: 비-id 조건도 같은 SQL 실행기 안에서 동작하는지 본다.
89                    ".exit",
90                    "",
91                ]
92            ),
93        )
94        assert_contains(output, "1,alice")
95        assert_contains(output, "5,bob")
96        assert_contains(output, "6,carol")
97
98        restart_output = run_db(
//리뷰 포인트: 프로그램 재시작 후에도 next_id와 재구축이 올바른지 확인한다.
99            binary_path,
100            "\n".join(
101                [
102                    "insert into users values (dave);",
103                    "select * from users where id = 7;",
104                    "select * from users where name = dave;",
105                    ".exit",
106                    "",
107                ]
108            ),
109        )
110        assert_contains(restart_output, "7,dave")
111
112    print("mini_db requirement tests passed")
113    return 0
114
115
116if __name__ == "__main__":
117    raise SystemExit(main())
